allow: PowerShell(npx astro build 2>&1 | Out-String | ForEach-Object { $_ -split "`n" } | Where-Object { $_ -match "knowledge-cards|Lesson|orbit|error|Error" } | Select-Object -First 100)

PowerShell(Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dist/server/entry.mjs" -RedirectStandardOutput "server.log" -RedirectStandardError "server.err.log"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/library" -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "ERR: $_" }; Stop-Process -Name node -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content server.log -Raw | Select-String -Pattern "knowledge-cards|orbit" -SimpleMatch | Select-Object -First 80 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })
PowerShell(Test-Path server.log; \(Get-Item server.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length; Test-Path server.err.log; \(Get-Item server.err.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Length)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/library" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | Select-String -Pattern "Lesson-1|Lesson-2|Lesson-3|Lesson-4|knowledge-cards|orbit" -AllMatches | Out-Null; "Lesson-1 count: " + \($r.Content -split "Lesson-1" | Measure-Object\).Count; "Lesson-2 count: " + \($r.Content -split "Lesson-2" | Measure-Object\).Count; "Lesson-3 count: " + \($r.Content -split "Lesson-3" | Measure-Object\).Count; "Lesson-4 count: " + \($r.Content -split "Lesson-4" | Measure-Object\).Count)
